title: Line Chart Schema
description: Intermediate representation for line chart diagrams. LLM extracts data from natural language into this format, then rendering pipeline generates HTML/SVG from it.

diagramType.description: Identifies this JSON as a line chart. Must always be 'line'.

title.description: Chart title, displayed at the top of the rendered page.

subtitle.description: Optional subtitle shown below the title, typically describing the unit or scope.

style.description: Visual style preset. Each style has its own template and design rules.

format.description: Output format. HTML is the default (single-file with inline SVG and CSS). SVG outputs standalone SVG. Mermaid uses xychart-beta syntax (experimental).

density.description: Layout density. compact=tighter spacing; normal=standard; spacious=generous spacing.

smooth.description: Whether to use smooth Bezier curves instead of straight line segments. When true, Catmull-Rom to Bezier conversion is applied.

series.description: Data series. Each series contains data points with labels and values. All series must share the same X-axis labels.

name.description: Series name displayed in the legend.

color.description: Optional color override for the line and data points. Must be 6-digit hex (#RRGGBB). If omitted, uses the chart palette.

lineStyle.description: Line stroke style. solid=continuous line; dashed=dashed line pattern.

dataPointShape.description: Shape of data point markers. none=no markers drawn.

data.description: Data points in this series. Each has a label and numeric value. All series must have the same labels.

axis.description: Axis configuration for both X and Y axes.

y.description: Y-axis configuration (value axis). Default gridLines=true for line charts.

legend.description: Legend configuration. Auto-generated from series names if not provided.

colors.description: Optional color overrides for the style's environment colors (background, text, etc.). Does NOT affect data line colors — use series[].color for that.

metadata.description: Optional metadata. author field is for internal tracking only and MUST NOT be rendered into the output.
